response.justification: Strong generalist engineer with 15+ years of experience, recent Staff role at Google touching MCP and agentic workflow tooling, and solid full-stack credentials. However, the resume shows limited explicit depth in production GenAI delivery, RAG/vector databases, evaluation pipelines, and customer-facing technical discovery, which are central to this Staff Forward Deployed role. The GenAI exposure is recent and lightly described, so an interview is warranted to probe actual depth.
strengths: Recent Google Staff experience touching MCP and AI-agent infrastructure/tooling
15+ years shipping production systems across TypeScript/Node, Python-adjacent stacks, and cloud-deployed services
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, courses, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective)
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience called out
Forward-deployed/customer-facing discovery experience not evidenced; background is product engineering, not consulting delivery
Python is not listed in skills; primary languages are TS/JS and DLang, which is a partial mismatch
